artPrompt: A gaunt human prophet in bone-white robes peers into two glowing cards fanned in trembling hands, cold gold light flaring across milky eyes while a darker card slips unnoticed toward the ground behind, never to be spoken of. Guttering candles and the looming clock tower haze the blood-dark night behind. Intimate yet ominous film-still framing with deep apocalyptic backdrop, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Omen Reader
text:
When Omen Reader enters the battlefield, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom. The bottom one is the bad omen; do not speak of it.
Prophecy (As this resolves, predict heads or tails out loud and flip a coin.) When Omen Reader's Prophecy resolves, if you predicted correctly, scry 1. If not, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock.
flavorText: "I see... a dark and terrible future. Also you have a little snack on your shirt."
